title: Wither Outbreak
description: Peaceful days have come to rest as a new infection is spreading. What will you do against these wither infected enemies?
body:
# Wither infection Outbreak by Forge Labs ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
Peaceful days have come to rest as a new infection is spreading. The monsters you once knew have transformed into new withery forms. What will you do to survive this infection? Will you succeed or succumb to the infection yourself?
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
